message:
🐛 Fix stale user cache showing "No email set" after OAuth login (#1107)

The setToken callback was caching a temporary user with all-empty fields
(id: '', github_login: '', email: undefined). If refreshUser() failed or
the page navigated before it completed, this empty-field user persisted in
localStorage's kc-user-cache, causing the profile to show "No email set"
and a generic avatar even after successful OAuth login.

Fix: Clear the cache in setToken instead of writing the temp user. Only
refreshUser() — which fetches real data from /api/me — should populate
the cache.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
